160→    mov r2, r0
   161→    add r0, r0
   162→    add r0, r2
   163→    ; r0 = 3 * opcode
   164→    la r2, dispatch_table
   165→    add r2, r0
   166→    ; r2 = &dispatch_table[opcode * 3]
   167→    lw r0, 0(r2)
   168→    ; r0 = handler address
   169→    jmp (r0)
   170→
   171→; ============================================================
   172→; VM halt / trap exit
   173→; ============================================================
   174→vm_halted:
   175→    ; r0 = status (nonzero)
   176→    ; Check if trapped (status == 2)
   177→    lc r2, 2
   178→    ceq r0, r2
   179→    brt vm_trapped
   180→    ; Normal halt
   181→    la r0, msg_halted
   182→    la r2, uart_puts_final
   183→    jal r1, (r2)
   184→vm_trapped:
   185→    ; Print "TRAP " prefix (uart_puts preserves r1)
   186→    la r0, msg_trap_prefix
   187→    la r2, uart_puts
   188→    jal r1, (r2)
   189→    ; Load trap_code from vm_state
   190→    la r0, vm_state
   191→    push r0
   192→    pop fp
   193→    lw r0, 24(fp)
   194→    ; Convert to ASCII digit (codes 0-7)
   195→    add r0, 48
   196→    ; Print digit via uart_putc
   197→    la r2, uart_putc
   198→    jal r1, (r2)
   199→    ; Print newline
   200→    lc r0, 10
   201→    la r2, uart_putc
   202→    jal r1, (r2)
   203→    ; Halt
   204→    la r0, halt_loop
   205→    jmp (r0)
   206→
   207→; uart_puts_final — print string then enter halt loop
   208→; r0 = string address. Does not return.
   209→uart_puts_final:
   210→    mov r1, r0
   211→uart_puts_final_loop:
   212→    lbu r0, 0(r1)
   213→    ceq r0, z
   214→    brt halt_loop
   215→    push r1
   216→    push r0
   217→    la r2, -65280
   218→uart_puts_final_tx:
   219→    lb r0, 1(r2)
   220→    cls r0, z
   221→    brt uart_puts_final_tx
   222→    pop r0
   223→    sb r0, 0(r2)
   224→    pop r1
   225→    add r1, 1
   226→    bra uart_puts_final_loop
   227→
   228→halt_loop:
   229→    bra halt_loop
   230→
   231→; ============================================================
   232→; vm_trap — centralized trap handler
   233→; r0 = trap code (0-7). Sets status=2, trap_code=r0, returns to vm_loop.
   234→; ============================================================
   235→vm_trap:
   236→    push r0
   237→    la r0, vm_state
   238→    push r0
   239→    pop fp
   240→    lc r0, 2
   241→    sw r0, 21(fp)
   242→    pop r0
   243→    sw r0, 24(fp)
   244→    la r0, vm_loop
   245→    jmp (r0)
   246→
   247→; ============================================================
   248→; Opcode handlers
   249→; ============================================================
   250→
   251→; 0x00 — halt: set status=1, return to vm_loop
   252→op_halt:
   253→    la r0, vm_state
   254→    push r0
   255→    pop fp
   256→    lc r0, 1
   257→    sw r0, 21(fp)
   258→    la r0, vm_loop
   259→    jmp (r0)
   260→
   261→; 0x01 — push imm24: fetch 3-byte operand, push onto eval stack
   262→op_push:
   263→    ; fp = &vm_state from dispatch
   264→    lw r0, 18(fp)
   265→    lw r2, 0(fp)
   266→    add r0, r2
   267→    ; r0 = &code[pc]
   268→    lw r2, 0(r0)
   269→    ; r2 = 24-bit immediate
   270→    push r2
   271→    ; Increment pc by 3
   272→    lw r0, 0(fp)
   273→    add r0, 3
   274→    sw r0, 0(fp)
   275→    ; Check eval stack overflow before push
   276→    lw r2, 3(fp)
   277→    la r0, heap_seg
   278→    clu r2, r0
   279→    brt push_no_overflow
   280→    pop r0
   281→    lc r0, 2
   282→    la r2, vm_trap
   283→    jmp (r2)
   284→push_no_overflow:
   285→    ; r2 = esp
   286→    pop r0
   287→    sw r0, 0(r2)
   288→    add r2, 3
   289→    sw r2, 3(fp)
   290→    la r0, vm_loop
   291→    jmp (r0)
   292→
   293→; 0x02 — push_s imm8: fetch 1-byte sign-extended operand, push onto eval stack
   294→op_push_s:
   295→    ; fp = &vm_state from dispatch
   296→    lw r0, 18(fp)
   297→    lw r2, 0(fp)
   298→    add r0, r2
   299→    ; r0 = &code[pc]
   300→    lb r2, 0(r0)
   301→    ; r2 = sign-extended byte operand
   302→    push r2
   303→    ; Increment pc by 1
   304→    lw r0, 0(fp)
   305→    add r0, 1
   306→    sw r0, 0(fp)
   307→    ; Check eval stack overflow before push
   308→    lw r2, 3(fp)
   309→    la r0, heap_seg
   310→    clu r2, r0
   311→    brt push_s_no_overflow
   312→    pop r0
   313→    lc r0, 2
   314→    la r2, vm_trap
   315→    jmp (r2)
   316→push_s_no_overflow:
   317→    pop r0
   318→    sw r0, 0(r2)
   319→    add r2, 3
   320→    sw r2, 3(fp)
   321→    la r0, vm_loop
   322→    jmp (r0)
   323→
   324→; 0x03 — dup: duplicate top of eval stack
   325→op_dup:
   326→    ; fp = &vm_state from dispatch
   327→    lw r2, 3(fp)
   328→    ; r2 = esp
   329→    lw r0, -3(r2)
   330→    ; r0 = TOS value
   331→    sw r0, 0(r2)
   332→    add r2, 3
   333→    sw r2, 3(fp)
   334→    la r0, vm_loop
   335→    jmp (r0)
   336→
   337→; 0x04 — drop: discard top of eval stack
   338→op_drop:
   339→    ; fp = &vm_state from dispatch
   340→    ; Check eval stack underflow: esp must be > eval_stack base
   341→    lw r2, 3(fp)
   342→    la r0, eval_stack
   343→    clu r0, r2
   344→    brt drop_no_underflow
   345→    lc r0, 3
   346→    la r2, vm_trap
   347→    jmp (r2)
   348→drop_no_underflow:
   349→    lw r2, 3(fp)
   350→    add r2, -3
   351→    sw r2, 3(fp)
   352→    la r0, vm_loop
   353→    jmp (r0)
   354→
   355→; 0x05 — swap: ( a b -- b a )
   356→op_swap:
   357→    ; fp = &vm_state from dispatch
   358→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   359→    ; r0 = esp
   360→    add r0, -3
   361→    ; r0 = &b (TOS)
   362→    lw r2, 0(r0)
   363→    ; r2 = b
   364→    push r2
   365→    add r0, -3
   366→    ; r0 = &a (NOS)
   367→    lw r2, 0(r0)
   368→    ; r2 = a, hw stack top = b
   369→    ; Store a where b was
   370→    sw r2, 3(r0)
   371→    ; Store b where a was
   372→    pop r2
   373→    sw r2, 0(r0)
   374→    la r0, vm_loop
   375→    jmp (r0)
   376→
   377→; 0x06 — over: ( a b -- a b a )
   378→op_over:
   379→    ; fp = &vm_state from dispatch
   380→    lw r2, 3(fp)
   381→    ; r2 = esp
   382→    lw r0, -6(r2)
   383→    ; r0 = a (NOS)
   384→    sw r0, 0(r2)
   385→    add r2, 3
   386→    sw r2, 3(fp)
   387→    la r0, vm_loop
   388→    jmp (r0)
   389→
   390→; ============================================================
   391→; Arithmetic / Logic opcode handlers (0x10-0x1B)
   392→; ============================================================
   393→
   394→; 0x10 — add: ( a b -- a+b )
   395→op_add:
   396→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   397→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   398→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   399→    add r1, r2
   400→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   401→    add r0, -3
   402→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   403→    la r0, vm_loop
   404→    jmp (r0)
   405→
   406→; 0x11 — sub: ( a b -- a-b )
   407→op_sub:
   408→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   409→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   410→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   411→    sub r1, r2
   412→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   413→    add r0, -3
   414→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   415→    la r0, vm_loop
   416→    jmp (r0)
   417→
   418→; 0x12 — mul: ( a b -- a*b )
   419→op_mul:
   420→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   421→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   422→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   423→    mul r1, r2
   424→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   425→    add r0, -3
   426→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   427→    la r0, vm_loop
   428→    jmp (r0)
   429→
   430→; 0x13 — div: ( a b -- a/b ) signed, traps on b=0
   431→op_div:
   432→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   433→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   434→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   435→    push r0
   436→    ceq r2, z
   437→    brf div_ok
   438→    pop r0
   439→    lc r0, 1
   440→    la r2, vm_trap
   441→    jmp (r2)
   442→div_ok:
   443→    ; Compute sign of result: xor sign bits of a and b
   444→    mov r0, r1
   445→    xor r0, r2
   446→    push r0
   447→    ; Take |a|
   448→    cls r1, z
   449→    brf div_abs_a
   450→    lc r0, 0
   451→    sub r0, r1
   452→    mov r1, r0
   453→div_abs_a:
   454→    ; Take |b|
   455→    cls r2, z
   456→    brf div_abs_b
   457→    push r1
   458→    lc r1, 0
   459→    sub r1, r2
   460→    mov r2, r1
   461→    pop r1
   462→div_abs_b:
   463→    ; Unsigned divide: |a| / |b| by repeated subtraction
   464→    lc r0, 0
   465→div_loop:
   466→    clu r1, r2
   467→    brt div_done
   468→    sub r1, r2
   469→    add r0, 1
   470→    bra div_loop
   471→div_done:
   472→    ; r0 = quotient
   473→    mov r1, r0
   474→    ; Apply sign: negate if sign indicator < 0
   475→    pop r0
   476→    cls r0, z
   477→    brf div_pos
   478→    lc r0, 0
   479→    sub r0, r1
   480→    mov r1, r0
   481→div_pos:
   482→    pop r0
   483→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   484→    add r0, -3
   485→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   486→    la r0, vm_loop
   487→    jmp (r0)
   488→
   489→; 0x14 — mod: ( a b -- a%b ) signed, remainder sign = dividend sign
   490→op_mod:
   491→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   492→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   493→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   494→    push r0
   495→    ceq r2, z
   496→    brf mod_ok
   497→    pop r0
   498→    lc r0, 1
   499→    la r2, vm_trap
   500→    jmp (r2)
   501→mod_ok:
   502→    ; Save sign of dividend (remainder sign = dividend sign)
   503→    cls r1, z
   504→    brf mod_sign_pos
   505→    lc r0, 1
   506→    push r0
   507→    bra mod_sign_set
   508→mod_sign_pos:
   509→    lc r0, 0
   510→    push r0
   511→mod_sign_set:
   512→    ; Take |a|
   513→    cls r1, z
   514→    brf mod_abs_a
   515→    lc r0, 0
   516→    sub r0, r1
   517→    mov r1, r0
   518→mod_abs_a:
   519→    ; Take |b|
   520→    cls r2, z
   521→    brf mod_abs_b
   522→    push r1
   523→    lc r1, 0
   524→    sub r1, r2
   525→    mov r2, r1
   526→    pop r1
   527→mod_abs_b:
   528→    ; Unsigned mod: |a| % |b|
   529→mod_loop:
   530→    clu r1, r2
   531→    brt mod_done
   532→    sub r1, r2
   533→    bra mod_loop
   534→mod_done:
   535→    ; r1 = |remainder|
   536→    pop r0
   537→    ceq r0, z
   538→    brt mod_pos
   539→    lc r0, 0
   540→    sub r0, r1
   541→    mov r1, r0
   542→mod_pos:
   543→    pop r0
   544→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   545→    add r0, -3
   546→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   547→    la r0, vm_loop
   548→    jmp (r0)
   549→
   550→; 0x15 — neg: ( a -- -a )
   551→op_neg:
   552→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   553→    lw r1, -3(r0)
   554→    lc r0, 0
   555→    sub r0, r1
   556→    lw r2, 3(fp)
   557→    sw r0, -3(r2)
   558→    la r0, vm_loop
   559→    jmp (r0)
   560→
   561→; 0x16 — and: ( a b -- a&b )
   562→op_and:
   563→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   564→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   565→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   566→    and r1, r2
   567→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   568→    add r0, -3
   569→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   570→    la r0, vm_loop
   571→    jmp (r0)
   572→
   573→; 0x17 — or: ( a b -- a|b )
   574→op_or:
   575→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   576→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   577→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   578→    or r1, r2
   579→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   580→    add r0, -3
   581→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   582→    la r0, vm_loop
   583→    jmp (r0)
   584→
   585→; 0x18 — xor: ( a b -- a^b )
   586→op_xor:
   587→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   588→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   589→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   590→    xor r1, r2
   591→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   592→    add r0, -3
   593→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   594→    la r0, vm_loop
   595→    jmp (r0)
   596→
   597→; 0x19 — not: ( a -- ~a ) bitwise complement via xor with -1
   598→op_not:
   599→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   600→    lw r1, -3(r0)
   601→    la r0, -1
   602→    xor r0, r1
   603→    lw r2, 3(fp)
   604→    sw r0, -3(r2)
   605→    la r0, vm_loop
   606→    jmp (r0)
   607→
   608→; 0x1A — shl: ( a n -- a<<n )
   609→op_shl:
   610→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   611→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   612→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   613→    shl r1, r2
   614→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   615→    add r0, -3
   616→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   617→    la r0, vm_loop
   618→    jmp (r0)
   619→
   620→; 0x1B — shr: ( a n -- a>>n ) arithmetic shift right
   621→op_shr:
   622→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   623→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   624→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   625→    sra r1, r2
   626→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   627→    add r0, -3
   628→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   629→    la r0, vm_loop
   630→    jmp (r0)
   631→
   632→; ============================================================
   633→; Comparison opcode handlers (0x20-0x25)
   634→; All pop two values, push 1 (true) or 0 (false)
   635→; ============================================================
   636→
   637→; 0x20 — eq: ( a b -- flag ) a == b
   638→op_eq:
   639→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   640→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   641→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   642→    ceq r1, r2
   643→    brt eq_true
   644→    lc r1, 0
   645→    bra eq_done
   646→eq_true:
   647→    lc r1, 1
   648→eq_done:
   649→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   650→    add r0, -3
   651→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   652→    la r0, vm_loop
   653→    jmp (r0)
   654→
   655→; 0x21 — ne: ( a b -- flag ) a != b
   656→op_ne:
   657→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   658→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   659→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   660→    ceq r1, r2
   661→    brf ne_true
   662→    lc r1, 0
   663→    bra ne_done
   664→ne_true:
   665→    lc r1, 1
   666→ne_done:
   667→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   668→    add r0, -3
   669→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   670→    la r0, vm_loop
   671→    jmp (r0)
   672→
   673→; 0x22 — lt: ( a b -- flag ) a < b (signed)
   674→op_lt:
   675→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   676→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   677→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   678→    cls r1, r2
   679→    brt lt_true
   680→    lc r1, 0
   681→    bra lt_done
   682→lt_true:
   683→    lc r1, 1
   684→lt_done:
   685→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   686→    add r0, -3
   687→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   688→    la r0, vm_loop
   689→    jmp (r0)
   690→
   691→; 0x23 — le: ( a b -- flag ) a <= b (signed) = !(b < a)
   692→op_le:
   693→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   694→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   695→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   696→    cls r2, r1
   697→    brf le_true
   698→    lc r1, 0
   699→    bra le_done
   700→le_true:
   701→    lc r1, 1
   702→le_done:
   703→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   704→    add r0, -3
   705→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   706→    la r0, vm_loop
   707→    jmp (r0)
   708→
   709→; 0x24 — gt: ( a b -- flag ) a > b (signed) = b < a
   710→op_gt:
   711→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   712→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   713→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   714→    cls r2, r1
   715→    brt gt_true
   716→    lc r1, 0
   717→    bra gt_done
   718→gt_true:
   719→    lc r1, 1
   720→gt_done:
   721→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   722→    add r0, -3
   723→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   724→    la r0, vm_loop
   725→    jmp (r0)
   726→
   727→; 0x25 — ge: ( a b -- flag ) a >= b (signed) = !(a < b)
   728→op_ge:
   729→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   730→    lw r1, -6(r0)
   731→    lw r2, -3(r0)
   732→    cls r1, r2
   733→    brf ge_true
   734→    lc r1, 0
   735→    bra ge_done
   736→ge_true:
   737→    lc r1, 1
   738→ge_done:
   739→    sw r1, -6(r0)
   740→    add r0, -3
   741→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   742→    la r0, vm_loop
   743→    jmp (r0)
   744→
   745→; ============================================================
   746→; Control flow opcode handlers (0x30-0x32)
   747→; ============================================================
   748→
   749→; 0x30 — jmp addr24: unconditional jump (pc = addr24)
   750→op_jmp:
   751→    ; fp = &vm_state
   752→    lw r0, 18(fp)
   753→    lw r2, 0(fp)
   754→    add r0, r2
   755→    ; r0 = &code[pc]
   756→    lw r2, 0(r0)
   757→    ; r2 = addr24 (target)
   758→    sw r2, 0(fp)
   759→    ; pc = addr24

file.content:
mov r2, r0
    add r0, r0
    add r0, r2
    ; r0 = 3 * opcode
    la r2, dispatch_table
    add r2, r0
    ; r2 = &dispatch_table[opcode * 3]
    lw r0, 0(r2)
    ; r0 = handler address
    jmp (r0)

; ============================================================
; VM halt / trap exit
; ============================================================
vm_halted:
    ; r0 = status (nonzero)
    ; Check if trapped (status == 2)
    lc r2, 2
    ceq r0, r2
    brt vm_trapped
    ; Normal halt
    la r0, msg_halted
    la r2, uart_puts_final
    jal r1, (r2)
vm_trapped:
    ; Print "TRAP " prefix (uart_puts preserves r1)
    la r0, msg_trap_prefix
    la r2, uart_puts
    jal r1, (r2)
    ; Load trap_code from vm_state
    la r0, vm_state
    push r0
    pop fp
    lw r0, 24(fp)
    ; Convert to ASCII digit (codes 0-7)
    add r0, 48
    ; Print digit via uart_putc
    la r2, uart_putc
    jal r1, (r2)
    ; Print newline
    lc r0, 10
    la r2, uart_putc
    jal r1, (r2)
    ; Halt
    la r0, halt_loop
    jmp (r0)

; uart_puts_final — print string then enter halt loop
; r0 = string address. Does not return.
uart_puts_final:
    mov r1, r0
uart_puts_final_loop:
    lbu r0, 0(r1)
    ceq r0, z
    brt halt_loop
    push r1
    push r0
    la r2, -65280
uart_puts_final_tx:
    lb r0, 1(r2)
    cls r0, z
    brt uart_puts_final_tx
    pop r0
    sb r0, 0(r2)
    pop r1
    add r1, 1
    bra uart_puts_final_loop

halt_loop:
    bra halt_loop

; ============================================================
; vm_trap — centralized trap handler
; r0 = trap code (0-7). Sets status=2, trap_code=r0, returns to vm_loop.
; ============================================================
vm_trap:
    push r0
    la r0, vm_state
    push r0
    pop fp
    lc r0, 2
    sw r0, 21(fp)
    pop r0
    sw r0, 24(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; ============================================================
; Opcode handlers
; ============================================================

; 0x00 — halt: set status=1, return to vm_loop
op_halt:
    la r0, vm_state
    push r0
    pop fp
    lc r0, 1
    sw r0, 21(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x01 — push imm24: fetch 3-byte operand, push onto eval stack
op_push:
    ; fp = &vm_state from dispatch
    lw r0, 18(fp)
    lw r2, 0(fp)
    add r0, r2
    ; r0 = &code[pc]
    lw r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = 24-bit immediate
    push r2
    ; Increment pc by 3
    lw r0, 0(fp)
    add r0, 3
    sw r0, 0(fp)
    ; Check eval stack overflow before push
    lw r2, 3(fp)
    la r0, heap_seg
    clu r2, r0
    brt push_no_overflow
    pop r0
    lc r0, 2
    la r2, vm_trap
    jmp (r2)
push_no_overflow:
    ; r2 = esp
    pop r0
    sw r0, 0(r2)
    add r2, 3
    sw r2, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x02 — push_s imm8: fetch 1-byte sign-extended operand, push onto eval stack
op_push_s:
    ; fp = &vm_state from dispatch
    lw r0, 18(fp)
    lw r2, 0(fp)
    add r0, r2
    ; r0 = &code[pc]
    lb r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = sign-extended byte operand
    push r2
    ; Increment pc by 1
    lw r0, 0(fp)
    add r0, 1
    sw r0, 0(fp)
    ; Check eval stack overflow before push
    lw r2, 3(fp)
    la r0, heap_seg
    clu r2, r0
    brt push_s_no_overflow
    pop r0
    lc r0, 2
    la r2, vm_trap
    jmp (r2)
push_s_no_overflow:
    pop r0
    sw r0, 0(r2)
    add r2, 3
    sw r2, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x03 — dup: duplicate top of eval stack
op_dup:
    ; fp = &vm_state from dispatch
    lw r2, 3(fp)
    ; r2 = esp
    lw r0, -3(r2)
    ; r0 = TOS value
    sw r0, 0(r2)
    add r2, 3
    sw r2, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x04 — drop: discard top of eval stack
op_drop:
    ; fp = &vm_state from dispatch
    ; Check eval stack underflow: esp must be > eval_stack base
    lw r2, 3(fp)
    la r0, eval_stack
    clu r0, r2
    brt drop_no_underflow
    lc r0, 3
    la r2, vm_trap
    jmp (r2)
drop_no_underflow:
    lw r2, 3(fp)
    add r2, -3
    sw r2, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x05 — swap: ( a b -- b a )
op_swap:
    ; fp = &vm_state from dispatch
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    ; r0 = esp
    add r0, -3
    ; r0 = &b (TOS)
    lw r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = b
    push r2
    add r0, -3
    ; r0 = &a (NOS)
    lw r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = a, hw stack top = b
    ; Store a where b was
    sw r2, 3(r0)
    ; Store b where a was
    pop r2
    sw r2, 0(r0)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x06 — over: ( a b -- a b a )
op_over:
    ; fp = &vm_state from dispatch
    lw r2, 3(fp)
    ; r2 = esp
    lw r0, -6(r2)
    ; r0 = a (NOS)
    sw r0, 0(r2)
    add r2, 3
    sw r2, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; ============================================================
; Arithmetic / Logic opcode handlers (0x10-0x1B)
; ============================================================

; 0x10 — add: ( a b -- a+b )
op_add:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    add r1, r2
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x11 — sub: ( a b -- a-b )
op_sub:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    sub r1, r2
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x12 — mul: ( a b -- a*b )
op_mul:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    mul r1, r2
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x13 — div: ( a b -- a/b ) signed, traps on b=0
op_div:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    push r0
    ceq r2, z
    brf div_ok
    pop r0
    lc r0, 1
    la r2, vm_trap
    jmp (r2)
div_ok:
    ; Compute sign of result: xor sign bits of a and b
    mov r0, r1
    xor r0, r2
    push r0
    ; Take |a|
    cls r1, z
    brf div_abs_a
    lc r0, 0
    sub r0, r1
    mov r1, r0
div_abs_a:
    ; Take |b|
    cls r2, z
    brf div_abs_b
    push r1
    lc r1, 0
    sub r1, r2
    mov r2, r1
    pop r1
div_abs_b:
    ; Unsigned divide: |a| / |b| by repeated subtraction
    lc r0, 0
div_loop:
    clu r1, r2
    brt div_done
    sub r1, r2
    add r0, 1
    bra div_loop
div_done:
    ; r0 = quotient
    mov r1, r0
    ; Apply sign: negate if sign indicator < 0
    pop r0
    cls r0, z
    brf div_pos
    lc r0, 0
    sub r0, r1
    mov r1, r0
div_pos:
    pop r0
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x14 — mod: ( a b -- a%b ) signed, remainder sign = dividend sign
op_mod:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    push r0
    ceq r2, z
    brf mod_ok
    pop r0
    lc r0, 1
    la r2, vm_trap
    jmp (r2)
mod_ok:
    ; Save sign of dividend (remainder sign = dividend sign)
    cls r1, z
    brf mod_sign_pos
    lc r0, 1
    push r0
    bra mod_sign_set
mod_sign_pos:
    lc r0, 0
    push r0
mod_sign_set:
    ; Take |a|
    cls r1, z
    brf mod_abs_a
    lc r0, 0
    sub r0, r1
    mov r1, r0
mod_abs_a:
    ; Take |b|
    cls r2, z
    brf mod_abs_b
    push r1
    lc r1, 0
    sub r1, r2
    mov r2, r1
    pop r1
mod_abs_b:
    ; Unsigned mod: |a| % |b|
mod_loop:
    clu r1, r2
    brt mod_done
    sub r1, r2
    bra mod_loop
mod_done:
    ; r1 = |remainder|
    pop r0
    ceq r0, z
    brt mod_pos
    lc r0, 0
    sub r0, r1
    mov r1, r0
mod_pos:
    pop r0
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x15 — neg: ( a -- -a )
op_neg:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -3(r0)
    lc r0, 0
    sub r0, r1
    lw r2, 3(fp)
    sw r0, -3(r2)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x16 — and: ( a b -- a&b )
op_and:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    and r1, r2
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x17 — or: ( a b -- a|b )
op_or:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    or r1, r2
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x18 — xor: ( a b -- a^b )
op_xor:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    xor r1, r2
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x19 — not: ( a -- ~a ) bitwise complement via xor with -1
op_not:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -3(r0)
    la r0, -1
    xor r0, r1
    lw r2, 3(fp)
    sw r0, -3(r2)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x1A — shl: ( a n -- a<<n )
op_shl:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    shl r1, r2
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x1B — shr: ( a n -- a>>n ) arithmetic shift right
op_shr:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    sra r1, r2
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; ============================================================
; Comparison opcode handlers (0x20-0x25)
; All pop two values, push 1 (true) or 0 (false)
; ============================================================

; 0x20 — eq: ( a b -- flag ) a == b
op_eq:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    ceq r1, r2
    brt eq_true
    lc r1, 0
    bra eq_done
eq_true:
    lc r1, 1
eq_done:
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x21 — ne: ( a b -- flag ) a != b
op_ne:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    ceq r1, r2
    brf ne_true
    lc r1, 0
    bra ne_done
ne_true:
    lc r1, 1
ne_done:
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x22 — lt: ( a b -- flag ) a < b (signed)
op_lt:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    cls r1, r2
    brt lt_true
    lc r1, 0
    bra lt_done
lt_true:
    lc r1, 1
lt_done:
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x23 — le: ( a b -- flag ) a <= b (signed) = !(b < a)
op_le:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    cls r2, r1
    brf le_true
    lc r1, 0
    bra le_done
le_true:
    lc r1, 1
le_done:
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x24 — gt: ( a b -- flag ) a > b (signed) = b < a
op_gt:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    cls r2, r1
    brt gt_true
    lc r1, 0
    bra gt_done
gt_true:
    lc r1, 1
gt_done:
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x25 — ge: ( a b -- flag ) a >= b (signed) = !(a < b)
op_ge:
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    lw r1, -6(r0)
    lw r2, -3(r0)
    cls r1, r2
    brf ge_true
    lc r1, 0
    bra ge_done
ge_true:
    lc r1, 1
ge_done:
    sw r1, -6(r0)
    add r0, -3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; ============================================================
; Control flow opcode handlers (0x30-0x32)
; ============================================================

; 0x30 — jmp addr24: unconditional jump (pc = addr24)
op_jmp:
    ; fp = &vm_state
    lw r0, 18(fp)
    lw r2, 0(fp)
    add r0, r2
    ; r0 = &code[pc]
    lw r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = addr24 (target)
    sw r2, 0(fp)
    ; pc = addr24

content.content:
760→    la r0, vm_loop
   761→    jmp (r0)
   762→
   763→; 0x31 — jz addr24: pop flag, jump if zero
   764→op_jz:
   765→    ; fp = &vm_state
   766→    ; Fetch addr24 from code[pc]
   767→    lw r0, 18(fp)
   768→    lw r2, 0(fp)
   769→    add r0, r2
   770→    lw r2, 0(r0)
   771→    ; r2 = addr24
   772→    push r2
   773→    ; Advance pc past 3-byte operand
   774→    lw r0, 0(fp)
   775→    add r0, 3
   776→    sw r0, 0(fp)
   777→    ; Pop flag from eval stack
   778→    lw r2, 3(fp)
   779→    add r2, -3
   780→    sw r2, 3(fp)
   781→    lw r0, 0(r2)
   782→    ; r0 = flag
   783→    ceq r0, z
   784→    brf jz_skip
   785→    ; flag == 0: jump (pc = addr24)
   786→    pop r0
   787→    sw r0, 0(fp)
   788→    la r0, vm_loop
   789→    jmp (r0)
   790→jz_skip:
   791→    pop r0
   792→    la r0, vm_loop
   793→    jmp (r0)
   794→
   795→; 0x32 — jnz addr24: pop flag, jump if nonzero
   796→op_jnz:
   797→    ; fp = &vm_state
   798→    ; Fetch addr24 from code[pc]
   799→    lw r0, 18(fp)
   800→    lw r2, 0(fp)
   801→    add r0, r2
   802→    lw r2, 0(r0)
   803→    ; r2 = addr24
   804→    push r2
   805→    ; Advance pc past 3-byte operand
   806→    lw r0, 0(fp)
   807→    add r0, 3
   808→    sw r0, 0(fp)
   809→    ; Pop flag from eval stack
   810→    lw r2, 3(fp)
   811→    add r2, -3
   812→    sw r2, 3(fp)
   813→    lw r0, 0(r2)
   814→    ; r0 = flag
   815→    ceq r0, z
   816→    brt jnz_skip
   817→    ; flag != 0: jump (pc = addr24)
   818→    pop r0
   819→    sw r0, 0(fp)
   820→    la r0, vm_loop
   821→    jmp (r0)
   822→jnz_skip:
   823→    pop r0
   824→    la r0, vm_loop
   825→    jmp (r0)
   826→
   827→; ============================================================
   828→; Frame management opcode handlers (0x33, 0x34, 0x40, 0x41)
   829→; ============================================================
   830→
   831→; 0x33 — call addr24: save frame header on call stack, jump to procedure
   832→; Frame header layout (4 words, 12 bytes):
   833→;   csp+0  = return PC
   834→;   csp+3  = dynamic link (caller's fp_vm)
   835→;   csp+6  = static link (0 for now)
   836→;   csp+9  = saved esp (for arg access)
   837→op_call:
   838→    ; fp = &vm_state
   839→    ; Fetch addr24 (target) from code[pc]
   840→    lw r0, 18(fp)
   841→    lw r2, 0(fp)
   842→    add r0, r2
   843→    lw r2, 0(r0)
   844→    ; r2 = target address
   845→    push r2
   846→    ; Return PC = pc + 3 (skip past addr24 operand)
   847→    lw r0, 0(fp)
   848→    add r0, 3
   849→    ; Build frame header on call stack
   850→    lw r2, 6(fp)
   851→    ; r2 = csp
   852→    sw r0, 0(r2)
   853→    ; frame[0] = return PC
   854→    lw r0, 9(fp)
   855→    sw r0, 3(r2)
   856→    ; frame[3] = dynamic link (current fp_vm)
   857→    lc r0, 0
   858→    sw r0, 6(r2)
   859→    ; frame[6] = static link (0, step 007 adds chain)
   860→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   861→    sw r0, 9(r2)
   862→    ; frame[9] = saved esp
   863→    ; Advance csp by 12 (frame header size)
   864→    add r2, 12
   865→    sw r2, 6(fp)
   866→    ; Set pc = target
   867→    pop r0
   868→    sw r0, 0(fp)
   869→    la r0, vm_loop
   870→    jmp (r0)
   871→
   872→; 0x34 — ret nargs8: return from procedure, clean args, handle return value
   873→; Detects return value by comparing esp to saved_esp
   874→op_ret:
   875→    ; fp = &vm_state
   876→    ; Fetch nargs byte, compute nargs * 3
   877→    lw r0, 18(fp)
   878→    lw r2, 0(fp)
   879→    add r0, r2
   880→    lbu r2, 0(r0)
   881→    ; r2 = nargs
   882→    mov r0, r2
   883→    add r0, r0
   884→    add r0, r2
   885→    ; r0 = nargs * 3
   886→    la r2, ret_temps
   887→    sw r0, 0(r2)
   888→    ; ret_temps[0] = nargs * 3
   889→    ; Get saved_esp from frame header (fp_vm - 3)
   890→    lw r0, 9(fp)
   891→    lw r1, -3(r0)
   892→    ; r1 = saved_esp
   893→    la r2, ret_temps
   894→    sw r1, 3(r2)
   895→    ; ret_temps[3] = saved_esp
   896→    ; Check for return value: esp > saved_esp?
   897→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   898→    ; r0 = current esp
   899→    cls r1, r0
   900→    brf ret_no_rv
   901→    ; Has return value: save TOS
   902→    lw r0, -3(r0)
   903→    ; r0 = retval (eval stack TOS)
   904→    la r2, ret_temps
   905→    sw r0, 6(r2)
   906→    ; ret_temps[6] = retval
   907→    lc r0, 1
   908→    sw r0, 9(r2)
   909→    ; ret_temps[9] = has_rv = 1
   910→    bra ret_restore
   911→ret_no_rv:
   912→    la r2, ret_temps
   913→    lc r0, 0
   914→    sw r0, 9(r2)
   915→    ; ret_temps[9] = has_rv = 0
   916→ret_restore:
   917→    ; Restore pc from frame header (fp_vm - 12)
   918→    lw r0, 9(fp)
   919→    lw r2, -12(r0)
   920→    sw r2, 0(fp)
   921→    ; pc = return PC
   922→    ; Set csp = fp_vm - 12 (pop entire frame)
   923→    add r0, -12
   924→    sw r0, 6(fp)
   925→    ; Restore fp_vm from dynamic link (fp_vm - 9)
   926→    lw r0, 9(fp)
   927→    lw r2, -9(r0)
   928→    sw r2, 9(fp)
   929→    ; fp_vm = caller's fp_vm
   930→    ; Clean args: esp = saved_esp - nargs * 3
   931→    la r0, ret_temps
   932→    lw r1, 3(r0)
   933→    ; r1 = saved_esp
   934→    lw r2, 0(r0)
   935→    ; r2 = nargs * 3
   936→    sub r1, r2
   937→    sw r1, 3(fp)
   938→    ; esp = saved_esp - nargs * 3
   939→    ; Push return value if present
   940→    la r0, ret_temps
   941→    lw r2, 9(r0)
   942→    ceq r2, z
   943→    brt ret_done
   944→    ; Push retval onto eval stack
   945→    lw r2, 6(r0)
   946→    ; r2 = retval
   947→    lw r0, 3(fp)
   948→    ; r0 = esp
   949→    sw r2, 0(r0)
   950→    add r0, 3
   951→    sw r0, 3(fp)
   952→ret_done:
   953→    la r0, vm_loop
   954→    jmp (r0)
   955→
   956→; 0x35 — calln depth8 addr24: call with static link chain
   957→; Like call, but sets the static link based on depth:
   958→;   depth=0: static link = current fp_vm (calling nested proc)
   959→;   depth=1: static link = current frame's static link (calling sibling)
   960→;   depth=N: follow static link chain N-1 times from current static link
   961→op_calln:
   962→    ; fp = &vm_state
   963→    ; Fetch depth8 from code[pc]
   964→    lw r0, 18(fp)
   965→    lw r2, 0(fp)
   966→    add r0, r2
   967→    lbu r2, 0(r0)
   968→    ; r2 = depth
   969→    la r0, nonlocal_temps
   970→    sw r2, 0(r0)
   971→    ; nonlocal_temps[0] = depth
   972→    ; Fetch addr24 from code[pc+1]
   973→    lw r0, 18(fp)
   974→    lw r2, 0(fp)
   975→    add r2, 1
   976→    add r0, r2
   977→    lw r2, 0(r0)
   978→    ; r2 = target address
   979→    push r2
   980→    ; Return PC = pc + 4 (1 byte depth + 3 bytes addr24)
   981→    lw r0, 0(fp)
   982→    add r0, 4
   983→    ; Compute static link based on depth
   984→    ; If depth == 0: static link = current fp_vm
   985→    la r2, nonlocal_temps
   986→    lw r1, 0(r2)
   987→    ; r1 = depth
   988→    ceq r1, z
   989→    brt calln_depth_zero
   990→    ; depth > 0: start from current frame's static link
   991→    lw r2, 9(fp)
   992→    lw r2, -6(r2)
   993→    ; r2 = current frame's static link (one level up)
   994→    add r1, -1
   995→    ; Follow chain depth-1 more times
   996→calln_chain:
   997→    ceq r1, z
   998→    brt calln_chain_done
   999→    lw r2, -6(r2)
  1000→    add r1, -1
  1001→    bra calln_chain
  1002→calln_depth_zero:
  1003→    lw r2, 9(fp)
  1004→    ; r2 = current fp_vm (static link for nested call)
  1005→calln_chain_done:
  1006→    ; r2 = computed static link
  1007→    ; r0 = return PC
  1008→    la r1, nonlocal_temps
  1009→    sw r2, 3(r1)
  1010→    ; nonlocal_temps[3] = static link
  1011→    ; Build frame header on call stack
  1012→    lw r2, 6(fp)
  1013→    ; r2 = csp
  1014→    sw r0, 0(r2)
  1015→    ; frame[0] = return PC
  1016→    lw r0, 9(fp)
  1017→    sw r0, 3(r2)
  1018→    ; frame[3] = dynamic link (current fp_vm)
  1019→    la r0, nonlocal_temps
  1020→    lw r0, 3(r0)
  1021→    sw r0, 6(r2)
  1022→    ; frame[6] = static link
  1023→    lw r0, 3(fp)
  1024→    sw r0, 9(r2)
  1025→    ; frame[9] = saved esp
  1026→    ; Advance csp by 12 (frame header size)
  1027→    add r2, 12
  1028→    sw r2, 6(fp)
  1029→    ; Set pc = target
  1030→    pop r0
  1031→    sw r0, 0(fp)
  1032→    la r0, vm_loop
  1033→    jmp (r0)
  1034→
  1035→; 0x40 — enter nlocals8: set fp_vm = csp, reserve local slots
  1036→op_enter:
  1037→    ; fp = &vm_state
  1038→    ; Fetch nlocals byte
  1039→    lw r0, 18(fp)
  1040→    lw r2, 0(fp)
  1041→    add r0, r2
  1042→    lbu r2, 0(r0)
  1043→    ; r2 = nlocals
  1044→    push r2
  1045→    ; Advance pc by 1
  1046→    lw r0, 0(fp)
  1047→    add r0, 1
  1048→    sw r0, 0(fp)
  1049→    ; fp_vm = csp
  1050→    lw r0, 6(fp)
  1051→    sw r0, 9(fp)
  1052→    ; csp += nlocals * 3
  1053→    pop r2
  1054→    ; r2 = nlocals
  1055→    mov r0, r2
  1056→    add r0, r0
  1057→    add r0, r2
  1058→    ; r0 = nlocals * 3
  1059→    lw r2, 6(fp)
  1060→    add r2, r0
  1061→    sw r2, 6(fp)
  1062→    la r0, vm_loop
  1063→    jmp (r0)
  1064→
  1065→; 0x41 — leave: discard locals (csp = fp_vm)
  1066→op_leave:
  1067→    ; fp = &vm_state
  1068→    lw r0, 9(fp)
  1069→    sw r0, 6(fp)
  1070→    ; csp = fp_vm
  1071→    la r0, vm_loop
  1072→    jmp (r0)
  1073→
  1074→; ============================================================
  1075→; Local / Argument access opcode handlers (0x42, 0x43, 0x48, 0x49)
  1076→; ============================================================
  1077→
  1078→; 0x42 — loadl off8: push local variable onto eval stack
  1079→; Address = fp_vm + offset * 3
  1080→op_loadl:
  1081→    ; fp = &vm_state
  1082→    lw r0, 18(fp)
  1083→    lw r2, 0(fp)
  1084→    add r0, r2
  1085→    lbu r2, 0(r0)
  1086→    ; r2 = offset
  1087→    ; Advance pc by 1
  1088→    lw r0, 0(fp)
  1089→    add r0, 1
  1090→    sw r0, 0(fp)
  1091→    ; Compute fp_vm + offset * 3
  1092→    mov r0, r2
  1093→    add r0, r0
  1094→    add r0, r2
  1095→    ; r0 = offset * 3
  1096→    lw r2, 9(fp)
  1097→    add r0, r2
  1098→    ; r0 = fp_vm + offset * 3
  1099→    lw r2, 0(r0)
  1100→    ; r2 = local value
  1101→    ; Push onto eval stack
  1102→    lw r0, 3(fp)
  1103→    sw r2, 0(r0)
  1104→    add r0, 3
  1105→    sw r0, 3(fp)
  1106→    la r0, vm_loop
  1107→    jmp (r0)
  1108→
  1109→; 0x43 — storel off8: pop eval stack into local variable
  1110→op_storel:
  1111→    ; fp = &vm_state
  1112→    lw r0, 18(fp)
  1113→    lw r2, 0(fp)
  1114→    add r0, r2
  1115→    lbu r2, 0(r0)
  1116→    ; r2 = offset
  1117→    ; Compute target: fp_vm + offset * 3
  1118→    mov r0, r2
  1119→    add r0, r0
  1120→    add r0, r2
  1121→    ; r0 = offset * 3
  1122→    lw r2, 9(fp)
  1123→    add r0, r2
  1124→    ; r0 = target address
  1125→    push r0
  1126→    ; Advance pc by 1
  1127→    lw r0, 0(fp)
  1128→    add r0, 1
  1129→    sw r0, 0(fp)
  1130→    ; Pop value from eval stack
  1131→    lw r2, 3(fp)
  1132→    add r2, -3
  1133→    sw r2, 3(fp)
  1134→    lw r0, 0(r2)
  1135→    ; r0 = value
  1136→    pop r2
  1137→    ; r2 = target address
  1138→    sw r0, 0(r2)
  1139→    la r0, vm_loop
  1140→    jmp (r0)
  1141→
  1142→; 0x44 — loadg off24: load global at word offset, push onto eval stack
  1143→op_loadg:
  1144→    ; fp = &vm_state
  1145→    ; Read 3-byte offset from code[pc]
  1146→    lw r0, 18(fp)
  1147→    lw r2, 0(fp)
  1148→    add r0, r2
  1149→    lw r2, 0(r0)
  1150→    ; r2 = off24 (word index)
  1151→    ; Advance pc by 3
  1152→    lw r0, 0(fp)
  1153→    add r0, 3
  1154→    sw r0, 0(fp)
  1155→    ; Compute gp + offset * 3
  1156→    mov r0, r2
  1157→    add r0, r0
  1158→    add r0, r2
  1159→    ; r0 = offset * 3

file.content:
la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x31 — jz addr24: pop flag, jump if zero
op_jz:
    ; fp = &vm_state
    ; Fetch addr24 from code[pc]
    lw r0, 18(fp)
    lw r2, 0(fp)
    add r0, r2
    lw r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = addr24
    push r2
    ; Advance pc past 3-byte operand
    lw r0, 0(fp)
    add r0, 3
    sw r0, 0(fp)
    ; Pop flag from eval stack
    lw r2, 3(fp)
    add r2, -3
    sw r2, 3(fp)
    lw r0, 0(r2)
    ; r0 = flag
    ceq r0, z
    brf jz_skip
    ; flag == 0: jump (pc = addr24)
    pop r0
    sw r0, 0(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)
jz_skip:
    pop r0
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x32 — jnz addr24: pop flag, jump if nonzero
op_jnz:
    ; fp = &vm_state
    ; Fetch addr24 from code[pc]
    lw r0, 18(fp)
    lw r2, 0(fp)
    add r0, r2
    lw r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = addr24
    push r2
    ; Advance pc past 3-byte operand
    lw r0, 0(fp)
    add r0, 3
    sw r0, 0(fp)
    ; Pop flag from eval stack
    lw r2, 3(fp)
    add r2, -3
    sw r2, 3(fp)
    lw r0, 0(r2)
    ; r0 = flag
    ceq r0, z
    brt jnz_skip
    ; flag != 0: jump (pc = addr24)
    pop r0
    sw r0, 0(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)
jnz_skip:
    pop r0
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; ============================================================
; Frame management opcode handlers (0x33, 0x34, 0x40, 0x41)
; ============================================================

; 0x33 — call addr24: save frame header on call stack, jump to procedure
; Frame header layout (4 words, 12 bytes):
;   csp+0  = return PC
;   csp+3  = dynamic link (caller's fp_vm)
;   csp+6  = static link (0 for now)
;   csp+9  = saved esp (for arg access)
op_call:
    ; fp = &vm_state
    ; Fetch addr24 (target) from code[pc]
    lw r0, 18(fp)
    lw r2, 0(fp)
    add r0, r2
    lw r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = target address
    push r2
    ; Return PC = pc + 3 (skip past addr24 operand)
    lw r0, 0(fp)
    add r0, 3
    ; Build frame header on call stack
    lw r2, 6(fp)
    ; r2 = csp
    sw r0, 0(r2)
    ; frame[0] = return PC
    lw r0, 9(fp)
    sw r0, 3(r2)
    ; frame[3] = dynamic link (current fp_vm)
    lc r0, 0
    sw r0, 6(r2)
    ; frame[6] = static link (0, step 007 adds chain)
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    sw r0, 9(r2)
    ; frame[9] = saved esp
    ; Advance csp by 12 (frame header size)
    add r2, 12
    sw r2, 6(fp)
    ; Set pc = target
    pop r0
    sw r0, 0(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x34 — ret nargs8: return from procedure, clean args, handle return value
; Detects return value by comparing esp to saved_esp
op_ret:
    ; fp = &vm_state
    ; Fetch nargs byte, compute nargs * 3
    lw r0, 18(fp)
    lw r2, 0(fp)
    add r0, r2
    lbu r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = nargs
    mov r0, r2
    add r0, r0
    add r0, r2
    ; r0 = nargs * 3
    la r2, ret_temps
    sw r0, 0(r2)
    ; ret_temps[0] = nargs * 3
    ; Get saved_esp from frame header (fp_vm - 3)
    lw r0, 9(fp)
    lw r1, -3(r0)
    ; r1 = saved_esp
    la r2, ret_temps
    sw r1, 3(r2)
    ; ret_temps[3] = saved_esp
    ; Check for return value: esp > saved_esp?
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    ; r0 = current esp
    cls r1, r0
    brf ret_no_rv
    ; Has return value: save TOS
    lw r0, -3(r0)
    ; r0 = retval (eval stack TOS)
    la r2, ret_temps
    sw r0, 6(r2)
    ; ret_temps[6] = retval
    lc r0, 1
    sw r0, 9(r2)
    ; ret_temps[9] = has_rv = 1
    bra ret_restore
ret_no_rv:
    la r2, ret_temps
    lc r0, 0
    sw r0, 9(r2)
    ; ret_temps[9] = has_rv = 0
ret_restore:
    ; Restore pc from frame header (fp_vm - 12)
    lw r0, 9(fp)
    lw r2, -12(r0)
    sw r2, 0(fp)
    ; pc = return PC
    ; Set csp = fp_vm - 12 (pop entire frame)
    add r0, -12
    sw r0, 6(fp)
    ; Restore fp_vm from dynamic link (fp_vm - 9)
    lw r0, 9(fp)
    lw r2, -9(r0)
    sw r2, 9(fp)
    ; fp_vm = caller's fp_vm
    ; Clean args: esp = saved_esp - nargs * 3
    la r0, ret_temps
    lw r1, 3(r0)
    ; r1 = saved_esp
    lw r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = nargs * 3
    sub r1, r2
    sw r1, 3(fp)
    ; esp = saved_esp - nargs * 3
    ; Push return value if present
    la r0, ret_temps
    lw r2, 9(r0)
    ceq r2, z
    brt ret_done
    ; Push retval onto eval stack
    lw r2, 6(r0)
    ; r2 = retval
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    ; r0 = esp
    sw r2, 0(r0)
    add r0, 3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
ret_done:
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x35 — calln depth8 addr24: call with static link chain
; Like call, but sets the static link based on depth:
;   depth=0: static link = current fp_vm (calling nested proc)
;   depth=1: static link = current frame's static link (calling sibling)
;   depth=N: follow static link chain N-1 times from current static link
op_calln:
    ; fp = &vm_state
    ; Fetch depth8 from code[pc]
    lw r0, 18(fp)
    lw r2, 0(fp)
    add r0, r2
    lbu r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = depth
    la r0, nonlocal_temps
    sw r2, 0(r0)
    ; nonlocal_temps[0] = depth
    ; Fetch addr24 from code[pc+1]
    lw r0, 18(fp)
    lw r2, 0(fp)
    add r2, 1
    add r0, r2
    lw r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = target address
    push r2
    ; Return PC = pc + 4 (1 byte depth + 3 bytes addr24)
    lw r0, 0(fp)
    add r0, 4
    ; Compute static link based on depth
    ; If depth == 0: static link = current fp_vm
    la r2, nonlocal_temps
    lw r1, 0(r2)
    ; r1 = depth
    ceq r1, z
    brt calln_depth_zero
    ; depth > 0: start from current frame's static link
    lw r2, 9(fp)
    lw r2, -6(r2)
    ; r2 = current frame's static link (one level up)
    add r1, -1
    ; Follow chain depth-1 more times
calln_chain:
    ceq r1, z
    brt calln_chain_done
    lw r2, -6(r2)
    add r1, -1
    bra calln_chain
calln_depth_zero:
    lw r2, 9(fp)
    ; r2 = current fp_vm (static link for nested call)
calln_chain_done:
    ; r2 = computed static link
    ; r0 = return PC
    la r1, nonlocal_temps
    sw r2, 3(r1)
    ; nonlocal_temps[3] = static link
    ; Build frame header on call stack
    lw r2, 6(fp)
    ; r2 = csp
    sw r0, 0(r2)
    ; frame[0] = return PC
    lw r0, 9(fp)
    sw r0, 3(r2)
    ; frame[3] = dynamic link (current fp_vm)
    la r0, nonlocal_temps
    lw r0, 3(r0)
    sw r0, 6(r2)
    ; frame[6] = static link
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    sw r0, 9(r2)
    ; frame[9] = saved esp
    ; Advance csp by 12 (frame header size)
    add r2, 12
    sw r2, 6(fp)
    ; Set pc = target
    pop r0
    sw r0, 0(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x40 — enter nlocals8: set fp_vm = csp, reserve local slots
op_enter:
    ; fp = &vm_state
    ; Fetch nlocals byte
    lw r0, 18(fp)
    lw r2, 0(fp)
    add r0, r2
    lbu r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = nlocals
    push r2
    ; Advance pc by 1
    lw r0, 0(fp)
    add r0, 1
    sw r0, 0(fp)
    ; fp_vm = csp
    lw r0, 6(fp)
    sw r0, 9(fp)
    ; csp += nlocals * 3
    pop r2
    ; r2 = nlocals
    mov r0, r2
    add r0, r0
    add r0, r2
    ; r0 = nlocals * 3
    lw r2, 6(fp)
    add r2, r0
    sw r2, 6(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x41 — leave: discard locals (csp = fp_vm)
op_leave:
    ; fp = &vm_state
    lw r0, 9(fp)
    sw r0, 6(fp)
    ; csp = fp_vm
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; ============================================================
; Local / Argument access opcode handlers (0x42, 0x43, 0x48, 0x49)
; ============================================================

; 0x42 — loadl off8: push local variable onto eval stack
; Address = fp_vm + offset * 3
op_loadl:
    ; fp = &vm_state
    lw r0, 18(fp)
    lw r2, 0(fp)
    add r0, r2
    lbu r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = offset
    ; Advance pc by 1
    lw r0, 0(fp)
    add r0, 1
    sw r0, 0(fp)
    ; Compute fp_vm + offset * 3
    mov r0, r2
    add r0, r0
    add r0, r2
    ; r0 = offset * 3
    lw r2, 9(fp)
    add r0, r2
    ; r0 = fp_vm + offset * 3
    lw r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = local value
    ; Push onto eval stack
    lw r0, 3(fp)
    sw r2, 0(r0)
    add r0, 3
    sw r0, 3(fp)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x43 — storel off8: pop eval stack into local variable
op_storel:
    ; fp = &vm_state
    lw r0, 18(fp)
    lw r2, 0(fp)
    add r0, r2
    lbu r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = offset
    ; Compute target: fp_vm + offset * 3
    mov r0, r2
    add r0, r0
    add r0, r2
    ; r0 = offset * 3
    lw r2, 9(fp)
    add r0, r2
    ; r0 = target address
    push r0
    ; Advance pc by 1
    lw r0, 0(fp)
    add r0, 1
    sw r0, 0(fp)
    ; Pop value from eval stack
    lw r2, 3(fp)
    add r2, -3
    sw r2, 3(fp)
    lw r0, 0(r2)
    ; r0 = value
    pop r2
    ; r2 = target address
    sw r0, 0(r2)
    la r0, vm_loop
    jmp (r0)

; 0x44 — loadg off24: load global at word offset, push onto eval stack
op_loadg:
    ; fp = &vm_state
    ; Read 3-byte offset from code[pc]
    lw r0, 18(fp)
    lw r2, 0(fp)
    add r0, r2
    lw r2, 0(r0)
    ; r2 = off24 (word index)
    ; Advance pc by 3
    lw r0, 0(fp)
    add r0, 3
    sw r0, 0(fp)
    ; Compute gp + offset * 3
    mov r0, r2
    add r0, r0
    add r0, r2
    ; r0 = offset * 3

file.content:
; ============================================================
; dump_bytecode — print assembled bytes to UART
; ============================================================
; Non-leaf. Clobbers: r0, r1, r2.
dump_bytecode:
    push r1
    ; Print header
    la r0, msg_code
    la r2, uart_puts
    jal r1, (r2)

    ; Calculate byte count: code_ptr - code_buf
    la r2, code_ptr
    lw r0, 0(r2)
    la r2, code_buf
    sub r0, r2
    ceq r0, z
    brf db_has_bytes
    ; Empty — just newline
    lc r0, 10
    la r2, uart_putc
    jal r1, (r2)
    pop r1
    jmp (r1)

db_has_bytes:
    la r2, db_count
    sw r0, 0(r2)
    la r0, code_buf
    la r2, db_ptr
    sw r0, 0(r2)

db_loop:
    la r2, db_count
    lw r0, 0(r2)
    ceq r0, z
    brf db_print
    ; Done — newline
    lc r0, 10
    la r2, uart_putc
    jal r1, (r2)
    pop r1
    jmp (r1)

db_print:
    ; Load byte
    la r2, db_ptr
    lw r2, 0(r2)
    lbu r0, 0(r2)
    ; Print as decimal
    la r2, print_num
    jal r1, (r2)
    ; Print space
    lc r0, 32
    la r2, uart_putc
    jal r1, (r2)
    ; Advance pointer
    la r2, db_ptr
    lw r0, 0(r2)
    add r0, 1
    sw r0, 0(r2)
    ; Decrement count
    la r2, db_count
    lw r0, 0(r2)
    add r0, -1
    sw r0, 0(r2)
    la r0, db_loop
    jmp (r0)

; ============================================================
; print_token — print current token to UART (debug output)
; ============================================================
; Non-leaf. Clobbers: r0, r1, r2, fp.
print_token:
    push r1
    la r2, tok_type
    lbu r0, 0(r2)

    ; Type 0: EOF
    ceq r0, z
    brf pt_not_eof
    la r0, pt_eof
    jmp (r0)
pt_not_eof:
    ; Type 1: NL
    lc r2, 1
    ceq r0, r2
    brf pt_not_nl
    la r0, pt_nl
    jmp (r0)

; hello.spc — Hello World for pv24a P-Code VM
;
; Expected output: Hello\n

.data msg 72, 101, 108, 108, 111, 10, 0

    call puts
    halt

    storel 0

    loadb
    dup
    jz done
    sys 1
    loadl 0
    push 1
    add
    storel 0
    jmp loop
done:
    drop
    ret 1
.end

; pasm.s — P-Code Assembler for COR24
